---
title: "Social Diffusion Model"
description: "Repurposes the SI framework to model information and behavior spread through networks, comparing simple contagion with complex contagion requiring multiple reinforcing contacts."
author: "Samuel M. Jenness"
date: "2018-09-01"
categories: [SI, social diffusion, complex contagion, intermediate]
order: 7
execute:
  eval: false
---

::: {.callout-warning}
## Under Construction
This example is being converted to an annotated Quarto document. In the meantime, you can download and run the standalone scripts:

- [model.R](model.R)
- [module-fx.R](module-fx.R)
:::
